# Inkwell Agentic CMS

The forkable, Astro-powered CMS for agent-first publishing. Built on the Cloudflare edge.

## Sections

- [Docs](/docs) — Full Stripe-quality technical manuals.
- [Blog](/blog) — Strategic insights and build journals.
- [Team](/team) — Living workforce of humans and agents.
- [Labs](/labs) — Experiments in FRC physics and SOS kernels.
- [Market](/docs/strategy/market-positioning) — Positioning against Sanity, Contentful, and Mintlify.
- [Concepts](/docs/concepts/glossary) — Rosetta Stone for FRC (Φ, μ, Δ).
- [Internal Abstractions](/docs/reference/internal-abstractions) — Blueprints for renderers, SEO, and the Edge layer.

## Key Features

- **Wikilinks & Backlinks:** Semantic internal network.
- **14 Block Types:** Charts, Mermaid diagrams, Comparison tables.
- **Agent-Ready:** MCP Tools, JSON-LD, and structured schemas.
- **Edge-First:** Cloudflare Pages, Workers, D1, KV, and R2.
- **Feedback:** Real-time feedback loop with qualitative analysis.

## Core Mandates

1. **Perfect Interconnectedness:** Every file must be semantically linked.
2. **Stripe Quality:** Docs must be high-fidelity, interactive, and visually polished.
3. **Agentic Legibility:** The system must be clear to both humans and LLM agents.

---

[[docs/getting-started|Read the Getting Started guide]] to begin.
